user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The only available agent that can assist with email-related queries is the graph agent, which has access to Microsoft 365 email functionality. This step will check for emails received in the last 7 days and retrieve the sender and subject details.

steps.task: Retrieve emails received in the last 7 days and list the sender and subject for each email.

plan.synthesis: Compile the list of sender and subject from the results of step 1 into a final response.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve emails received in the last 7 days and list the sender and subject for each email.
